tagline: Enjoy A Crystal Clear Pool All Year Without the Hassle

hero.headline:
CPO-Certified Care for Every Pool
We Touch
hero.subheadline: When every technician on the team holds a Certified Pool Operator license, the difference shows in your water. AJ Pools has kept South Florida pools sparkling since 2012 so you can skip the chemistry and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Expert Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Certified Professionals
services.subtitle: Every technician at AJ Pools is CPO-certified. That means precise chemistry, reliable equipment work, and a pool you can trust all year long.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough vacuuming, skimming, brushing, and chemical balancing every week. You get photo documentation after each visit so you always see the results.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, salt systems, variable speed motors, and full automation. We diagnose fast and get your equipment running right.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Replastering
cards.description: Acid washing, replastering, and cosmetic upgrades that restore your pool to like-new condition. Transform your backyard with a fresh finish.

cards.title: Gas Heater Installation
cards.description: Extend your swim season with a professionally installed gas pool heater. Enjoy warm water on demand, even through Florida's cooler months.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced detection technology pinpoints leaks fast. We repair the source and prevent further water loss or structural damage to your pool.

cards.title: Heat Pump Services
cards.description: Energy-efficient heat pump installation and repair to keep your pool at the perfect temperature without driving up your electric bill.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool, Handled in 3 Easy Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll send a CPO-certified tech for a free on-site assessment. No pressure, no obligation — just honest recommendations.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our certified team handles cleaning, chemistry, and equipment checks on a reliable schedule. You'll get photo reports after every visit so you're always in the loop.

steps.title: Just Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready every single day. If anything ever isn't right, we come back and fix it — that's our happiness guarantee.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts AJ Pools
about.headline: Started at 13. CPO-Certified at 18. Leading the Team Since 2012.
about.description: Andrew founded AJ Pools after years of hands-on experience that started when he was just 13 years old. He earned his Certified Pool Operator license at 18 and built a company where every single employee carries that same certification. That's not industry standard — that's our standard. For over 14 years, we've served Pompano Beach and surrounding South Florida communities with the kind of care that turns first-time customers into long-term clients.

features.title: Every Employee CPO-Certified
features.description: Not just management — every technician who touches your pool holds a Certified Pool Operator license. That's precision you can trust.

features.title: Photo Reports After Every Visit
features.description: You'll never wonder what was done. We send photos and a service summary so you see exactly how your pool looks after each service.

features.title: 100% Happiness Guarantee
features.description: If you're not completely satisfied with a visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. Period.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Flexible plans, no long-term contracts — upgrade or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our 100% Happiness Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, just let us know. We'll send a CPO-certified tech back out to make it right at no additional cost. Your satisfaction isn't negotiable — it's the foundation we built this company on.

faqs.question: How soon can AJ Pools start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent situations like green pools or equipment failures, we offer 24-hour emergency response. Call us and we'll find the fastest path to clean water.

faqs.question: What does CPO-certified actually mean for my pool?
faqs.answer: CPO stands for Certified Pool Operator, a nationally recognized credential that covers water chemistry, equipment maintenance, and health safety standards. Every AJ Pools technician holds this certification, which means more accurate chemical balancing, better equipment diagnostics, and a safer swimming environment for your family.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our customers provide gate access so we can service the pool while they're away. After every visit, you'll receive photo documentation and a service summary so you know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: No contracts, ever. We believe in earning your business every single week. You're free to adjust, pause, or cancel service at any time with no fees and no hassle.

faqs.question: What areas in South Florida do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Pompano Beach, Boca Raton, Parkland, Coral Springs, Coconut Creek, Delray Beach, Deerfield Beach, Lighthouse Point, and surrounding communities throughout South Florida.

testimonials.name: Long-term Customer
testimonials.text: We have used AJ Pools for 6 years. Owner Andrew regularly checks in on customer satisfaction, office manager Alicia is responsive, and technicians Jesus and Carlos are delightful and thorough.

testimonials.name: Fountain Project Client
testimonials.text: The fountain reconstruction was done fantastically with amazing water jets and top-shelf stonework. Absolutely incredible work.

testimonials.name: Weekly Service Customer
testimonials.text: Sparkling clean results every single week. I love that they send photos after each visit so I always know the condition of my pool.
